title: stillingia jacobinensis
intro: Stillingia jacobinensis, also known as Queens delight, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly found in the Caribbean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Stillingia jacobinensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
